name: Tonix Pharmaceuticals Holding Corp.
business: Tonix Pharmaceuticals is a fully-integrated biopharmaceutical company commercializing and developing innovative therapies for central nervous system disorders, immunology, infectious diseases, and rare diseases. It launched TONMYA (cyclobenzaprine HCl sublingual tablets) for the treatment of fibromyalgia in adults on November 17, 2025, and markets two FDA-approved prescription products for acute migraine: Zembrace SymTouch (sumatriptan injection) and Tosymra (sumatriptan nasal spray). The company also has a development pipeline including clinical and preclinical programs across multiple therapeutic areas.
sellsTo: Physicians and healthcare prescribers treating fibromyalgia (rheumatologists, primary care physicians, pain specialists, neurologists, psychiatrists)

exposures.sentence: We launched TONMYA (cyclobenzaprine HCl sublingual tablets) for the treatment of fibromyalgia in adults on November 17, 2025.

We are exploring the utility of TNX-102 SL (cyclobenzaprine HCl sublingual tablets) in Phase 2 clinical trials for major depressive disorder ( MDD ) and acute stress disorder ( ASD ) and acute stress reaction ( ASR ).

Our clinical stage infectious disease portfolio includes monoclonal antibody TNX-4800 (anti-OspA from Borrelia burgdorferi ) for seasonal prevention of Lyme disease, for which initiation of a Phase 2 field study is planned for the first half of 2027 and a Phase 2 human challenge study is planned for 2028, pending FDA clearances.

Our clinical-stage immunology development portfolio consists of biologics to address organ transplant rejection and autoimmunity, including TNX-1500, which is a Phase 2- ready Fc-modified humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CD40-ligand (CD40L or CD154) being developed for the prevention of allograft rejection and for the treatment of autoimmune diseases.
Another CNS candidate in clinical development is TNX-1300 (double-mutant cocaine esterase), which is in Phase 2 for the treatment of cocaine intoxication.

Our clinical-stage rare disease portfolio includes TNX-2900, intranasal oxytocin potentiated with magnesium, in development for Prader-Willi syndrome and expected to start a Phase 2 study in the first quarter of 2027.
Our pre-clinical, pre-IND infectious disease portfolio includes TNX-801 (horsepox, live virus vaccine), as vaccine for mpox and smallpox.

Our pre-IND infectious disease portfolio also includes TNX-4200, which is a small molecule broad-spectrum antiviral agent targeting CD45 for the prevention or treatment of high lethality infections to improve the medical readiness of military personnel in biological threat environments.
Our prospects are highly dependent on the success of TONMYA.

catalysts.sentence: We launched TONMYA (cyclobenzaprine HCl sublingual tablets) for the treatment of fibromyalgia in adults on November 17, 2025.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 study of TNX-102 SL for MDD expected to commence
catalysts.sentence: A Phase 2 study of TNX-102 SL for major depressive disorder is expected to commence mid-2026 under a Tonix IND that has been cleared by the FDA.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 field study for TNX-4800 planned initiation
catalysts.sentence: initiation of a Phase 2 field study is planned for the first half of 2027 and of a Phase 2 human challenge study for 2028, pending FDA clearances.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 human challenge study for TNX-4800 planned initiation
catalysts.sentence: initiation of a Phase 2 field study is planned for the first half of 2027 and of a Phase 2 human challenge study for 2028, pending FDA clearances.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 study for TNX-801 expected to enter
catalysts.sentence: TNX-801 is expected to enter a Phase 1 study in 2027 pending FDA clearance.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 study for TNX-2900 enrollment initiation
catalysts.sentence: We intend to initiate enrollment in this study in the first quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 study for TNX-1500 expected initiation
catalysts.sentence: The study is expected to be initiated mid-year 2026 pending FDA clearance of the IND.

tamClaims.claim: Fibromyalgia afflicts more than 10 million adults in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Fibromyalgia afflicts more than 10 million adults in the U.S., the majority of whom are women.

tamClaims.claim: More than 21 million adults in the U.S. experience a major depressive episode each year.
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, more than 21 million adults experience a major depressive episode each year.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 505,000 emergency room visits for cocaine abuse each year in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 505,000 emergency room visits for cocaine abuse each year in the U.S., of which 61,000 require detoxification services.

tamClaims.claim: One-third of emergency department visits (40-50 million patients per year) in the U.S. involve evaluation after trauma exposures.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S. alone, one-third of emergency department visits (40-50 million patients per year) involve evaluation after trauma exposures, and in a 2014 study involving U.S. veterans, 87% reported exposure to at least one potentially traumatic event during their service.
